app.description: ZeroTier creates secure networks between on-premise, cloud, desktop, and mobile devices. It enables direct connections for remote access, gaming, and IoT without complex firewall configurations.

dialog.title: ZeroTier Host Networking
dialog.message:
\Z1NOTE!\Zn

ZeroTier client will be installed in \Z2host networking\Zn mode.

This means all apps on the Docker host can be accessed using ZEROTIER-IP:PORT (e.g. \Z4http://XXX.XXX.XXX.XXX:3050\Zn for Deployrr Dashboard).

If you provide a Network ID, Deployrr will automatically connect your Docker host to the ZeroTier network after installation.

Do you wish to proceed?

messages.text: Remember to authorize this device in your ZeroTier Central dashboard at https://my.zerotier.com
